author: gb9t
content:
Iter 64 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (continuing user redirect):

- virt/kvm/00-overview.md: KVM full surface — generic core (vm/vcpu fd, memslots, dirty-ring, irqfd/ioeventfd, guest_memfd, async_pf, pfncache, vfio bridge), x86 arch (CPUID, emulator, in-kernel APIC/IOAPIC/PIC/PIT, MMU TDP+shadow, SMM, MTRR, Hyper-V, Xen, PMU), VMX shard (root+nested+posted-intr+SGX+TDX), SVM shard (root+nested+AVIC+SEV/SEV-ES/SEV-SNP). 13 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 7 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 31 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/base/00-overview.md: Linux Driver Model — device/bus/driver/class core, dd state machine + deferred probe, devres LIFO release, platform/auxiliary/faux/isa buses, devtmpfs, firmware loader (incl FW_UPLOAD), PM core (runtime + system + qos + wakeup), fwnode/property + swnode, regmap (mmio/i2c/spi/i3c/mdio/sdw/ac97/fsi/sccb + irq aggregation), component framework, transport_class, cpu/node/memory/cacheinfo sysdev surface, hypervisor topdir, syscore_ops, devcoredump. 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 27 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 166 .design docs, 31 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 16 sub-tier-2).

Knowledge pages: design-virt-kvm-overview, design-drivers-base-overview.

Iter 65 plan: kernel/perf/00-overview.md (perf events + hw breakpoints + tracepoints) + drivers/pci/00-overview.md (PCI/PCIe core + AER + SR-IOV + ATS/PASID + hotplug + ASPM).
